title: Software Development Engineer 2
description:
Software Development Engineers \\[Integrated Engineers] are responsible for development of computer programming systems and applications including the design, coding, testing and deployment of products and solutions to meet firm obligations. The Software Development Engineering focus specializes in the design, development and testing of software systems for software enhancements and new products including cloud\\-based or internet\\-related tools. conducts, and evaluates application audits and testing processes and ensures the applications or products meet those defined quality standards. May also create documentation so that future managers and engineers know how to solve potential issues. In addition to software design and development skill sets, employees in these roles should have in\\-depth knowledge of automated testing tools and traditional quality assurance approaches.
   

  

 Cloud Development: Focus specializes in the development, deployment and maintenance of applications and computing solutions that can be hosted and operated entirely on web based platforms. Plans, designs, develops, tests and troubleshoots cloud based application, works across the complete cloud stack i.e. Software as a Service (SaaS), and/or Platform as a Service (PaaS) and/or Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS) leveraging suites like Salesforce.com, cloud platform, Microsoft Office 365, Windows Azure, Google App Engine and Amazon Web Services/EC2\\. Interacts with project managers to drive an optimized solution within known constraints. The job also requires in\\-depth understanding of cloud storage services such as EBS, Amazon S3, EFS etc. Involves integration of cloud applications and require knowledge of APIs, pre\\-scripting, post\\-scripting and integration testing.
   

  

 Mobile Development: Focus specializes in the development of software applications for proprietary/ licensable mobile devices and mobile platforms. Plans, designs, develops and tests applications for Android, iOS and other mobile platforms. Collaborates with analysts, other developers and project managers to determine the requirements for custom mobile applications, the mobile program's appearance, the functions that the application must perform and the integration requirements. Designs and codes the application using knowledge of the mobile platform, cross\\-platform development tools and relevant software languages. May also work on mobile security areas such as mobile data management required for the application. During these processes, modifications may be made until the application functions as planned. Provides support for released applications by fixing bugs and uploading upgraded versions. Requires expert knowledge of integrated development platforms such as Xamarin, Kony, Appcelerator, EMM/MDM, iOS SDK, Android SDK etc.
   

  

 Intermediate Professionals typically have a minimum of 3 \\- 5 years of related experience"

title: Senior Software Engineer - Agentic Systems
description:
**Our Purpose**
*Mastercard powers economies and empowers people in 200\\+ countries and territories worldwide. Together with our customers, we’re helping build a sustainable economy where everyone can prosper. We support a wide range of digital payments choices, making transactions secure, simple, smart and accessible. Our technology and innovation, partnerships and networks combine to deliver a unique set of products and services that help people, businesses and governments realize their greatest potential.*
**Title And Summary**
 Senior Software Engineer \\- Agentic Systems
   

  

 Who is Mastercard?
   

  

 Mastercard is a global technology company in the payments industry, building digital platforms that securely power commerce at global scale. Our technology enables innovation across financial services, data, AI, and digital experiences, while maintaining the highest standards of reliability, security, and trust.
   

  

 Business \\& Market Insights (B\\&MI) is Mastercard’s data, analytics, and intelligence organization, responsible for transforming vast, global data assets into actionable insights and decision support products for customers across industries. B\\&MI builds platforms and products that move beyond static analytics, embedding AI, advanced modeling, and increasingly agentic systems directly into customer workflows to help clients understand what is happening, what will happen next, and what actions to take. The team operates at global scale, partnering closely with product, engineering, and data teams to deliver secure, governed, and production ready intelligence solutions that drive measurable business outcomes.
   

  

 \\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_
   

  

**Overview**
 Mastercard is seeking a Senior Software Engineer (Level 7\\) with experience designing and building agentic systems, treating AI agents as production software components rather than experimental artifacts.
   

  

 In this role, you will focus on building the platform, orchestration, and runtime capabilities that allow AI agents and tools to execute safely and observably inside market\\-facing products. You will partner closely with AI Engineers but retain ownership of system level concerns such as identity, authorization, attribution, reliability, and operational controls.
   

  

 This role is ideal for engineers who excel in building distributed systems and are motivated by applying those fundamentals to modern AI driven architectures.
   

  

 \\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_
   

  

 Role \\& Responsibilities
   

  

**As a Senior Software Engineer – Agentic Systems, You Will**
* Design and build scalable, resilient software systems that orchestrate AI agents, tools, and services within enterprise environments.
* Treat agents as execution primitives, ensuring each action is explicitly attributable, authorized, auditable, and observable.
* Implement orchestration patterns such as supervisors, routers, planners, and stateful workflows for multi step agent execution.
* Build frameworks for tool invocation, error handling, retries, and compensating actions in agent driven workflows.
* Integrate identity, permissions, and policy enforcement directly into agent execution paths.
* Ensure systems meet Mastercard standards for reliability, security, compliance, and performance.
* Collaborate with AI Engineers to integrate models and prompts as components within larger systems.
* Own operational aspects of agentic platforms, including logging, monitoring, tracing, and incident response.
* Review code, mentor peers, and contribute to shared engineering standards and architectural decisions.


 \\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_
   

  

**Required Experience \\& Skills**
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent practical experience.
* Significant professional experience building distributed, production grade software systems.
* Strong proficiency in backend software development (e.g., Java, Kotlin, Python, or similar).
* Experience designing APIs, services, and asynchronous workflows.
* Deep understanding of authentication, authorization, and secure service to service communication.
* Experience operating systems with high reliability, availability, and regulatory requirements.
* Ability to work effectively in ambiguous problem spaces and evolve systems iteratively.


 \\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_
   

  

 Nice to Have
   

  

* Experience building systems that integrate LLMs or AI services.
* Familiarity with agent frameworks, workflow engines, or orchestration platforms.
* Experience designing audit friendly, policy driven platforms.


 \\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_
   

  

 Leveling \\& Scope
   

  

 This role aligns to Senior Software Engineer (Level 7\\) within Mastercard’s Software Engineering job family, emphasizing technical leadership, architectural contribution, and ownership of complex systems without people management responsibilities.
   

  

**Corporate Security Responsibility**
 All activities involving access to Mastercard assets, information, and networks comes with an inherent risk to the organization and, therefore, it is expected that every person working for, or on behalf of, Mastercard is responsible for information security and must:
   

  

* Abide by Mastercard’s security policies and practices;
* Ensure the confidentiality and integrity of the information being accessed;
* Report any suspected information security violation or breach, and
* Complete all periodic mandatory security trainings in accordance with Mastercard’s guidelines.

 Why Work From Home in Salem?
   

  

 Salem, a Bustling City Known For Its Industrial And Cultural Significance, Is Home To a Growing Number Of Remote Job Opportunities. The Shift To Remote Work Has Been Fueled By Advancements In Technology, Changing Employer Priorities, And a Growing Demand For Work\\-life Balance. Here’s Why WFH Jobs In Salem Are Worth Considering
   

  

* Flexibility: Remote jobs allow you to set your own schedule, making it easier to balance personal and professional responsibilities.
* Cost Savings: Eliminate commuting costs and save on expenses like fuel, public transport, or professional attire.
* Access to Diverse Roles: From tech to customer service, Salem’s remote job market spans multiple industries.
* Career Growth: Many WFH roles offer opportunities for skill development and career advancement without the need for relocation.
* Empowering Women and Freshers: Initiatives like Internshala’s “Internships for Women” provide flexible options for women and freshers to restart or begin their careers.


 With platforms like Shine.com, QuikrJobs, and Internshala reporting hundreds of WFH openings in Salem, now is the perfect time to explore these opportunities.
   

  

 Top Industries Offering Work From Home Jobs in Salem
   

  

**Education**
 Salem’s job market is diverse, with industries ranging from IT to education and customer service. Below are the top sectors offering WFH opportunities in 2026:
   

  

* Information Technology (IT) and Software Development


 The IT sector in Salem is thriving, with companies seeking remote professionals for roles like web development, software engineering, and UI/UX design.
   

  

* Popular Roles:
+ Web Developer (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React)
+ Software Engineer (.NET, Python, Java)
+ UI/UX Designer

* Skills Required: Proficiency in programming languages, knowledge of frameworks like Bootstrap or React, and familiarity with tools like Chrome Developer Console.
* Salary Range: ₹15,000–₹50,000/month for freshers; higher for experienced professionals.
* Data Entry and Back Office


 Data entry roles are ideal for those seeking entry\\-level WFH jobs with minimal experience requirements.
   

  

* Popular Roles:
+ Data Entry Operator
+ Back Office Executive
+ Computer Operator

* Skills Required: Basic computer skills, typing speed, and attention to detail.
* Salary Range: ₹5,000–₹30,000/month, depending on the role and hours.
* Digital Marketing


 Digital marketing is a booming field, with companies hiring for remote roles in SEO, content creation, and social media management.
   

  

* Popular Roles:
+ Digital Marketing Executive
+ Content Writer
+ Social Media Manager

* Skills Required: Knowledge of SEO tools, content creation, and social media platforms.
* Salary Range: ₹10,000–₹35,000/month for part\\-time or full\\-time roles.
* Customer Service and Telecalling


 Customer service roles are in high demand, offering flexible hours and remote work options.
   

  

* Popular Roles:
+ Customer Service Representative
+ BPO/Telecaller
+ Account Executive

* Skills Required: Communication skills, problem\\-solving, and fluency in Tamil or English.
* Salary Range: ₹8,000–₹20,000/month, with bonuses for performance.
* Education and Training


 Online teaching and training roles are growing, especially for those with expertise in specific subjects or skills.
   

  

* Popular Roles:
+ Online Tutor

+ Content Developer for E\\-Learning

* Skills Required: Subject expertise, communication skills, and familiarity with online teaching platforms.
* Salary Range: ₹8,000–₹25,000/month for part\\-time roles.
* Freelancing and Creative Roles


 Freelancing offers flexibility for creative professionals like graphic designers and videographers.
   

  

* Popular Roles:
+ Graphic Designer
+ Videographer
+ Freelance Content Writer

* Skills Required: Creativity, proficiency in tools like Adobe Suite, and time management.
* Salary Range: ₹10,000–₹40,000/month, depending on project volume.


 Top Platforms to Find WFH Jobs in Salem
   

  

 Finding The Right WFH Job Requires Knowing Where To Look. Here Are The Top Platforms To Explore For Remote Opportunities In Salem

**Also Read:**

 How to Land a Work From Home Job in Salem
   

  

 Securing a WFH job requires preparation and strategy. Follow these steps to increase your chances of success:
   

  

* Build a Strong Resume: Highlight relevant skills, certifications, and experience. Tailor your resume to the job role.
* Upskill: Take online courses in high\\-demand skills like digital marketing, coding, or customer service. Platforms like Internshala offer certified courses to boost your profile.
* Create a Professional Profile: Platforms like Shine.com and Naukri.com allow you to create detailed profiles. Include a professional photo, skills, and work samples.
* Apply Strategically: Use filters on job portals to find WFH roles in Salem that match your skills and experience.
* Prepare for Interviews: Practice common interview questions and ensure a stable internet connection for virtual interviews.
* Beware of Scams: Avoid job postings that ask for payment or promise guaranteed jobs. Reputable platforms like QuikrJobs and Shine.com emphasize avoiding such scams.


 Benefits of Work From Home Jobs for Salem Residents
   

  

 WFH jobs offer unique advantages for Salem residents, making them an attractive career choice:
   

  

* Work\\-Life Balance: Flexible schedules allow you to manage household responsibilities, especially for women and parents.
* Access to Global Opportunities: Work for companies outside Salem without relocating.
* Skill Development: Many roles provide training, helping you stay competitive in the job market.
* Reduced Stress: Eliminate long commutes and workplace pressures, leading to a healthier work environment.
* Diverse Opportunities: From part\\-time to full\\-time roles, there’s something for everyone, including freshers and homemakers.


 Challenges and How to Overcome Them
   

  

 While WFH jobs offer numerous benefits, they come with challenges. Here’s how to address them:
   

  

* Distractions at Home: Set up a dedicated workspace and maintain a schedule to stay focused.
* Limited Social Interaction: Join online communities or attend virtual networking events to stay connected.
* Technical Issues: Invest in a reliable internet connection and backup devices to ensure uninterrupted work.
* Time Management: Use tools like Trello or Google Calendar to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines.


 Success Stories from Salem’s WFH Professionals
   

  

* Priya, Digital Marketing Executive: After a career break, Priya found a part\\-time digital marketing role through Internshala. She now earns ₹25,000/month while managing her family responsibilities.
* Arjun, Data Entry Operator: A fresher, Arjun secured a WFH data entry job via QuikrJobs, earning ₹15,000/month with flexible hours.
* Lakshmi, Online Tutor: Lakshmi transitioned to online teaching through Shine.com, leveraging her teaching experience to earn ₹20,000/month part\\-time.


 These success stories highlight the potential of WFH jobs to transform lives in Salem.
   

  

 Conclusion – Work From Home Jobs in Salem
   

  

 Don’t miss out on the incredible work\\-from\\-home opportunities waiting for you in Salem! Whether you’re a fresher, a professional, or looking to restart your career, now is the time to act. Register on platforms like CareerCartz.com, Internshala, and NithraJobs today, update your resume, and start applying for roles that match your skills. Take control of your career, achieve work\\-life balance, and unlock your potential with a rewarding WFH job. Apply now and land your dream job before these opportunities are gone!
   

  

 FAQs – Work From Home Jobs in Salem
   

  

* What types of work\\-from\\-home jobs are available in Salem?


 Salem offers a variety of WFH jobs, including data entry, digital marketing, customer service, software development, and online teaching. Platforms like Shine.com and Internshala list roles across these categories.
   

  

* Are WFH jobs in Salem suitable for freshers?


 Yes, many WFH jobs, such as data entry, customer service, and HR roles, are ideal for freshers. Internshala lists over 752 fresher\\-friendly WFH jobs in Salem.
   

  

* What is the salary range for WFH jobs in Salem?


 Salaries vary by role. Data entry jobs pay ₹5,000–₹30,000/month, while IT roles can offer ₹15,000–₹50,000/month. Check platforms like Naukri.com for specific salary details.
   

  

* How can I avoid scams when applying for WFH jobs?


 Stick to reputable platforms like QuikrJobs and Shine.com, and never pay for job applications or interviews. Verify job postings and contact employers directly if suspicious.
   

  

* Do I need specific skills for WFH jobs in Salem?


 Skills depend on the role. Basic computer knowledge is sufficient for data entry, while IT roles require programming skills. Platforms like Internshala offer courses to upskill.
   

  

* Are there WFH jobs for women in Salem?


 Yes, initiatives like Internshala’s “Internships for Women” offer flexible WFH roles for women, including part\\-time and full\\-time options.
   

  

* What equipment do I need for WFH jobs?


 Most roles require a laptop, stable internet, and a quiet workspace. Some IT roles may need specific software like Adobe Suite or coding tools.
   

  

* Can I work part\\-time from home in Salem?


 Absolutely! Platforms like SimplyHired and Shine.com list over 60 part\\-time WFH jobs in Salem, including data entry and teaching roles.
   

  

* How do I apply for WFH jobs in Salem?


 Register on job portals like NithraJobs or EvaniosJobs, create a profile, and apply to roles matching your skills. Follow application instructions carefully.
   

  

* Are there WFH internships available in Salem?


 Yes, Internshala offers numerous WFH internships in Salem for freshers and students in fields like HR, digital marketing, and IT.

description:

 Lowe’s is a FORTUNE® 100 home improvement company serving approximately 16 million customer transactions a week in the United States. For more information, visit Lowes India
   

  

**About The Team**
 We are a high\\-performing global engineering team focused on delivering reliable and scalable ERP Finance solutions that support critical business operations. The team collaborates closely with business stakeholders and vendor partners across the US and Bangalore to provide 24x7 production support, drive new feature development, and explore innovative AI capabilities around ERP financial data.
   

  

 Team members have opportunities to work across cross\\-functional initiatives, gain exposure to Core Finance ERP modules, and contribute to key activities such as sprint planning, quarterly patching, observability and monitoring, performance optimization, and ensuring business\\-critical SLA commitments are met. We strongly emphasize individual growth through cross\\-learning, collaboration, and continuous innovation.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 The primary purpose of this role is to translate business requirements and functional specifications into logical program designs and to deliver code modules, stable application systems, and software solutions. This includes developing, configuring, or modifying complex integrated business and/or enterprise application solutions within various computing environments. This role facilitates the implementation and maintenance of complex business and enterprise software solutions to ensure successful deployment of released applications.
   

  

**Roles \\& Responsibilities**
* Translates complex business requirements and functional specifications into executable stories, designs, and code modules; partners with product teams to understand business needs and functional specifications.
* Independently writes high quality, maintainable, and robust code by building adequate test suits and observability framework.
* Guides application and software development teams in the design and build of complex solutions and ensures teams are in alignment with the architecture blueprint, standards, and strategies.
* Participates and mentor’s other engineers in software development technologies and processes by creating onboarding documents, root cause analysis, key learnings, demos, and share\\-out sessions.
* Automates and simplifies team development, tests, and operations processes for efficiency of delivering the work.
* Evaluates modern software, tools, and technologies to provide objective analysis and recommendations to the team.


**Years Of Experience**
* Minimum 5 years of experience in software development or a related field.


**Education Qualification \\& Certifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, computer information systems (CIS), or related field or equivalent years of experience in lieu of education requirement, if applicable.


**Primary Skills**
* 4 years of experience in any of following competencies: frontend technologies (user interface/user experience), middleware (microservices and application programming interfaces), database technologies, or DevOps.
* 4 years of experience working on project(s) involving the implementation of solutions applying development life cycles (SDLC) through iterative agile development.
* 3 years of Hands\\-on experience with ERP financial such as General Ledger, Account Payables
* 3 years of Hands\\-on experience with building Oracle ERP (Oracle Cloud Fusion) financial analytical reports
* 2 years of Hands\\-on experience with Fusion Data Intelligence (FDI) formerly Fusion Analytics Warehouse (FAW)
* 2 years of Hands\\-on experience with Oracle PL\\-SQL programming
* 1 years of Hands\\-on Python, SQL, or data science libraries/frameworks used for AI/ML integration and analytics automation is a plus.
* 4 years of experience writing technical documentation in a software environment, developing and implementing business systems within an organization, and working with source code control systems.
* 4 years of experience working with an IT Infrastructure Library (ITIL) framework, defect or incident tracking software, web services, and application and integration middleware.
* 4 years of experience in systems analysis, including defining technical requirements and performing high level design for complex solutions.
* 4 years of experience working with three or more of the following: Continuous integration/continuous deployment tools, frontend technologies, middleware, database technologies, and/or DevOps.
* Experience leveraging AI/ML technologies for analytics, reporting automation, anomaly detection, predictive insights, or intelligent business process optimization.
* Experience integrating AI\\-enabled reporting solutions using Oracle Analytics Cloud (OAC), Oracle AI services, Generative AI capabilities, or enterprise data platforms.
* Familiarity with Machine Learning concepts such as data modeling, forecasting, classification, recommendation systems, and intelligent automation in enterprise applications.
* Experience utilizing Generative AI tools (e.g., Oracle Generative AI Services, OCI AI Services, LLM\\-powered assistants, Copilot technologies) to improve developer productivity, reporting insights, or operational efficiency.
* Knowledge of data engineering and AI/ML workflows including data preparation, feature engineering, model deployment, and monitoring within cloud environments.
